metadata.description: Rafayel's plugin marketplace for Claude Code

plugins.name: rafayels-engineering
plugins.description: End-to-end feature workflow with brainstorm-plan-work-review-compound pipeline. 30 agents, 28 commands, 23 skills, 4 LSP servers. Case-based memory layer with vector retrieval (sqlite-vec + fastembed), pattern detection and auto-PR generation, pluggable orchestrator strategies, Obsidian vault researcher. Stack: Go, TypeScript, SvelteKit, Python.
